Drop-in UI Customization Structures

The following structures are used with Xbox Drop-in UI customization:

Structure Description
UIX_SKIN_ICON_INFO Describes the layout of an icon within a text string. Used with the ITitleUIPlugin::SetText method.
UIX_SKIN_LAYOUT_INFO Describes the layout of a UI object. This structure is retrieved from the skin file with the IPluginSupport::GetLayout method.
